supported_devices: grow lights (2 independent channels), HVAC, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, CO2 generators, CO2 regulators, programmable timer devices
compatible_ec_fans: any 0-10V EC fans (via VFSC-1 variable fan speed controller station accessory)
compatible_lights: any (via LMA series lighting adapters; 2 independent dimming channels)
compatible_sensors: TrolMaster MBS-Pro 4-in-1 sensor (temp/humidity/CO2/light, up to 6 per set), MBS-PAR quantum sensor (1 per set), smoke detector (up to 10), water leak detector (up to 10)
compatible_humidifiers: any commercial humidifier/dehumidifier (via relay device stations, max 8 devices each)
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 generator or regulator (via relay device stations, max 4 devices)
recommended_use_note: Mid-tier touchscreen controller positioned between HCS-1 and HCS-2. Two independent lighting channels enable separate light schedules and dimming for different grow zones or stages. DLI tracking and Sunrise/Sunset simulation. Wired Ethernet only.
uvp_notes: German retailer price incl. 19% VAT (€1,156.20 excl. VAT). No official manufacturer UVP published.
notes: SKU: HCS-3. 7" touchscreen (800×480 LED). Input 100–240VAC/50/60Hz. 2 independent lighting channels with dimming and Spectrum/Group control. Max 8 temperature devices, 8 humidity devices, 4 CO2 devices, 12 programmable timers (up to 50 schedules). Includes MBS-Pro 4-in-1 sensor. DLI tracking, Sunrise/Sunset simulation, overheat protection. Wired Ethernet only; no built-in WiFi. TM+ app for remote monitoring.
